Order to Show Cause to Mrk Lipton, Esq., for failure to appear at the January 7, 2002 Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference and OSC to Claudia R. Lewin, Esq., for failure to appear at the January 7, 2002 Pre-Arbitration Settlement Confererence are heard this day. After argument of counsel court ordered sanctions in the amount of $100.00, issued to defendant's counsel for failure to appear at the 1/7/2002 Pre-Arbitration settlement Conference. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $200.00 for failure to appear at the 1/7/2002 Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference and for failure to appear at the OSC today. Proceedings reported by: Judith Ossa.
